positive: A minimalist, stylish illustration of a serene forest animal silhouette, such as a leaping deer or stylized fox, set against a vibrant, abstract geometric backdrop. The animal should be drawn with strong, crisp black lines, maintaining a clean, elegant silhouette suitable for apparel printing. Incorporate complementary pops of color inspired by nature—deep emerald, sapphire blue, and burnt orange—used in geometric patterns that complement the main subject, creating a harmonious, graphic design aesthetic. The composition should be centered and balanced, with the subject taking prominence. Style should be a blend of Art Deco geometry and modern flat graphic design. Vector illustration quality, high contrast, flat colors, print-ready, isolated on a neutral background.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noisy, low detail, amateur, messy lines, text, watermark, logo, trademark, cartoonish, realism, gradient, photorealistic, bad anatomy, extra limbs, complex shadows, depth of field
